name: Rumul
description_en: Rumul is the Ottrani village elder, who embodies Soraka's philosophy and wisdom best. Gentle and compassionate, he is very protective of his family and the stellacorns in their care. He often wanders Targon in search of new knowledge, and Soraka has inspired his travels. He always returns from his travels with gifts for his family - Osu, the Illi's dog, was one such gift, as was Illi's first shepherd's crook. Many Ottrani refers to him as grandfather.
description_fr: Rumul est l'aîné du village Ottrani, qui incarne le mieux la philosophie et la sagesse de Soraka. Doux et compatissant, il est très protecteur envers sa famille et les étoiles dont ils ont la garde. Il parcourt souvent Targon à la recherche de nouvelles connaissances, et Soraka a inspiré ses voyages. Il revient toujours de ses voyages avec des cadeaux pour sa famille - Osu, le chien d'Illi, était l'un de ces cadeaux, tout comme le premier bâton de berger d'Illi. De nombreux Ottrani l'appellent grand-père.
